title: Task runner container becomes unhealthy in Coolify deployment
symptom: The task-runner container becomes unhealthy after 1 minute, preventing code nodes from running. The logs indicate it gets stuck waiting for the task broker.
not_this_if: Docker-compose file has been edited correctly
root_cause: The task runner is trying to connect to the main n8n instance instead of the worker container due to an incorrect configuration of the `N8N_RUNNERS_TASK_BROKER_URI` environment variable.
fix_steps: Open the docker-compose.yaml file for your n8n deployment.
Update the `N8N_RUNNERS_TASK_BROKER_URI` environment variable to point to the `n8n-worker` container: `N8N_RUNNERS_TASK_BROKER_URI=${N8N_RUNNERS_TASK_BROKER_URI:-http://n8n-worker:5679}`.
Ensure the value is correctly configured in Coolify environment variables.
agent_instruction: Update the task broker URI in the docker-compose file and restart the n8n instance.
